tests.description: Race-loser cost is propagated EXACTLY: every completed LLM call across winner + losers contributes to parent cost, nothing is over-counted or under-counted. With branches doing 1, 2, 3 LLM calls and the winner being k=1, mocks 1–5 are consumed deterministically (k=3's third call is aborted before completion). Asserts the total equals 5 × DETERMINISTIC_COST exactly. A regression that propagated only the winner, double-counted, or missed a loser would fail.
